stats.title: бһҹбҹ’бһҗбһ·бһҸбһ·
stats.noSessionsHint: бһӣбҹҒбһ„ a game to see your stats here

report.runUnavailable: бһҸбҹ’бһҡбһ№бһҳбһҸбҹ’бһҡбһјбһңion report unavailable for this run.

confidence.notIncluded: бһ‘бҹҒt included in the score for this session (x0).

unifiedReport.upsNotComputedWithCount: бһ‘бҹҒt computed for this session ({count} responses).
unifiedReport.noDetails: бһ–бҹҗбһҸбҹҢбһҳбһ¶бһ“бһӣбһҳбҹ’бһўбһ·бһҸ not available for this session
unifiedReport.dualnbackClassicThresholdExplanation: бһҸбһ·бһ… than 3 errors per modality to validate
unifiedReport.bwStrikeExplanation: 3 missed session in a row: return to consolidate your skills.

bwMessages.strikeSecond: Two consecutive session below target. Stay at this level.
bwMessages.strikeThird: Three consecutive session not validated. You return to the previous level.

hybridJourneyMessages.pendingPair: This Track session only prepares the decision. бһңбһҢбҹ’бһҚбһ“бһ—бһ¶бһ–ion will be decided after the DNB session.

unifiedReport.journeyCurrentStateNotice: This report is no longer aligned with the current journey state. бһ…бһ¶бһ”бҹӢбһ•бҹ’бһҸбһҫбһҳ from the current journey step instead.

tooltips.dPrime: бһҳбһ¶бһҸбҹ’бһҡбһҠбҹ’бһӢбһ¶бһ“ SDTбҹ– бһңбһ¶бһҹбҹӢбһҹбһҳбһҸбҹ’бһҗбһ—бһ¶бһ–бһҖбҹ’бһ“бһ»бһ„бһҖбһ¶бһҡбһҡбһҫбһҹбһўбһҫбһ„бһӮбҹ„бһӣбһҠбҹ…бҹ” d' бһ“бҹғ 2.0 бһ¬бһҒбҹ’бһ–бһҹбҹӢбһҮбһ¶бһ„ = бһҠбҹҶбһҺбһҫбһҡбһҖбһ¶бһҡбһӣбҹ’бһўбҹ”
tooltips.brainWorkshop: бһ–бһ·бһ“бҹ’бһ‘бһ» = (бһҸбҹ’бһҡбһјбһң + бһҸбҹ’бһҡбһ№бһҳбһҸбҹ’бһҡбһјбһң Rejections вҲ’ False Alarms вҲ’ бһҒбһ»бһҹ) Г· бһҹбһҡбһ»бһ”. бһҖбһ¶бһҡбһҮбһјбһ“бһҠбҹҶбһҺбһ№бһ„бһҳбһ·бһ“бһ–бһ·бһҸ hurt your score!

unifiedReport.trendNotEnoughSessions: бһӣбҹҒбһ„ {{count}} more session(s) to see your progress
unifiedReport.trendSource: Based on your last {{count}} session in the same mode

components.timingHelp: бһ…бҹӮбһҖбһҡбҹҶбһӣбҹӮбһҖ of responses made during stimulus display (lower = better). Can be disabled (x0) on some session.
components.pressStabilityHelp: Stability of press duration (keyboard/controller). бһ”бһҫбһҖ touch/mouse it can be disabled (x0) because it is too noisy.

unifiedReport.confidenceNotComputed: бһ‘бҹҒt computed for this session ({count} responses, min {min}).

journey.title: бһҠбҹҶбһҺбһҫбһҡ
journey.dualTrackDnbHybridDesc: Hybrid journey alternating Dual Track then Dual N-бһҸбҹ’бһҡбһЎбһ”бҹӢбһҖбҹ’бһҡбҹ„бһҷ Classic

history.title: бһ”бҹ’бһҡбһңбһҸбҹ’бһҸбһ·бһҹбһҳбҹҗбһҷ
history.noSessionsHint: бһӣбҹҒбһ„ a game to see your results here

delete.bulkWarning: This action is irreversible. бһ‘бһ¶бҹҶбһ„бһўбһҹбҹӢ selected session will be permanently deleted.

messages.excellentSubtitle: You're mastering Dual N-бһҸбҹ’бһҡбһЎбһ”бҹӢбһҖбҹ’бһҡбҹ„бһҷ. Keep pushing your limits!
messages.goodSubtitle: You're progressing well. A few more session to reach excellence.
messages.startingSubtitle: Welcome! A few session are enough to see significant progress.

advanced.cvLegend: < 15% бһӣбҹ’бһўбһҘбһҸбһҒбҹ’бһ…бҹ„бҹҮ В· 15-25% бһӣбҹ’бһў В· 25-35% бһҳбһ’бҹ’бһҷбһҳ В· > бһҒбҹ’бһ–бһҹбҹӢ 35%
advanced.pesNoErrorsDesc: бһ‘бҹҒ errors to analyze for this metric
advanced.rtDefinitionNote: бһ‘бҹҒte: during/after is inferred from game state; RT may mix onset/offset.

progression.title: бһңбһҢбҹ’бһҚбһ“бһ—бһ¶бһ–ion
progression.noProgressionHint: бһӣбҹҒбһ„ a game to start your progression

tooltips.passRateDesc: Percentage of session where you reached the success threshold (d-prime вүҘ 1.5). Indicates your consistency.
tooltips.maxLevelDesc: The highest N-бһҸбҹ’бһҡбһЎбһ”бҹӢбһҖбҹ’бһҡбҹ„бһҷ level you've reached. Your personal record!
tooltips.totalTimeDesc: бһҹбһҡбһ»бһ” time spent training. Consistency is key to progress.
tooltips.trendDesc: Evolution of your performance over recent session. Calculated by comparing your recent average to your overall average.
tooltips.confidenceDesc: Reliability of the trend analysis. The more session you have, the more accurate the analysis.
tooltips.reactionTimeDesc: бһҳбһ’бҹ’бһҷбһҳ time between stimulus appearance and your response. Lower is faster.
tooltips.accuracyDesc: Overall percentage of correct responses (hits) across all your session
tooltips.sessionsDesc: бһҹбһҡбһ»бһ” number of completed training session
tooltips.currentLevelDesc: Your current N-бһҸбҹ’бһҡбһЎбһ”бҹӢбһҖбҹ’бһҡбҹ„бһҷ level. N-2 = remember 2 turns back, N-3 = 3 turns, etc.
tooltips.bestHourDesc: The time of day when you typically get the best results. Useful for planning your session.
tooltips.modalitiesDesc: The sensory channels active during training. бһ”бһ“бҹ’бһҗбҹӮбһҳ channels = more cognitive demand.
tooltips.progressionMLDesc: Uses your history to predict your optimal level. Needs 10+ session to be accurate.
tooltips.generatorBWDesc: Controls % of targets and lures. бһ”бһ“бҹ’бһҗбҹӮбһҳ balanced and predictable sequences.
tooltips.generatorJaeggiDesc: Faithful reproduction of the Dual N-бһҸбҹ’бһҡбһЎбһ”бҹӢбһҖбҹ’бһҡбҹ„бһҷ classic protocol (2008). 20 trials with fixed structure.
tooltips.luresDesc: бһҖбһ¶бһҡбһҡбҹҶбһүбҹ„бһ…бһҹбҹ’бһҡбһҠбҹҖбһ„бһӮбҹ’бһ“бһ¶ бһ”бҹүбһ»бһ“бҹ’бһҸбҹӮбһҒбһ»бһҹ (бһ§. N-1 бһ¬ N+1 бһҮбҹҶбһ“бһҪбһҹбһұбҹ’бһҷ N)бҹ” бһ’бҹ’бһңбһҫбһұбҹ’бһҷбһ бҹ’бһӮбҹҒбһҳбһҖбһ¶бһ“бҹӢбһҸбҹӮбһ–бһ·бһ”бһ¶бһҖбһҠбҹ„бһҷбһ”бһ„бҹ’бһҖбһҫбһҸбһ—бһ¶бһ–бһ…бҹ’бһҡбһ”бһјбһҖбһ…бҹ’бһҡбһ”бһӣбҹӢбҹ”
tooltips.percentilesDesc: бһ”бһ„бҹ’бһ бһ¶бһүs how your session are distributed. P25 = 25% are below this, P50 = median, P75 = 75% are below this.
tooltips.upsStdDevDesc: бһңбһ¶бһҹбҹӢбһңбҹӮбһ„бһҗбһ¶бһҸбһҫбһ–бһ·бһ“бҹ’бһ‘бһ» UPS бһҡбһ”бһҹбҹӢбһўбҹ’бһ“бһҖбһҳбһ¶бһ“бһ—бһ¶бһ–бһҹбҹҠбһёбһҹбһ„бҹ’бһңбһ¶бһҖбҹӢбһӮбҹ’бһ“бһ¶бһ”бҹүбһ»бһҺбҹ’бһҺбһ¶бҹ” бһ‘бһ¶бһ” Пғ = бһҖбһ¶бһҡбһўбһ“бһ»бһңбһҸбҹ’бһҸбһҳбһ¶бһ“бһҹбҹ’бһҗбҹҒбһҡбһ—бһ¶бһ–бһҮбһ¶бһ„бһҳбһ»бһ“бҹ” бһҒбҹ’бһ–бһҹбҹӢбһҮбһ¶бһ„ Пғ = бһўбһҗбҹҒбһҡбһ…бҹ’бһҡбһҫбһ“бһ‘бҹҖбһҸбҹ”
tooltips.falseAlarmsDesc: бһҖбһ¶бһҡбһҮбһјбһ“бһҠбҹҶбһҺбһ№бһ„бһҳбһ·бһ“бһ–бһ·бһҸ: when you responded but there was no match. Often indicates impulsivity or confusion.
tooltips.hitRateDesc: Proportion of correctly detected matches. бһҸбҹ’бһҡбһјбһң / (бһҸбҹ’бһҡбһјбһң + бһҒбһ»бһҹ). Higher is better.
tooltips.faRateDesc: Proportion of false alarms among non-matches. FA / (FA + бһҸбҹ’бһҡбһ№бһҳбһҸбҹ’бһҡбһјбһң Rejections). Lower is better.
tooltips.avgSessionDesc: бһҳбһ’бҹ’бһҷбһҳ training time per active day in the filtered period
tooltips.maxNDesc: Highest N-бһҸбҹ’бһҡбһЎбһ”бҹӢбһҖбҹ’бһҡбҹ„бһҷ level reached during this period. Your difficulty ceiling.
tooltips.upsDesc: Unified бһ”бҹ’бһҡбһҸбһ·бһ”бһҸбҹ’бһҸбһ·бһҖбһ¶бһҡ бһ–бһ·бһ“бҹ’бһ‘бһ» (0-100) combining accuracy (60%) and confidence (40%). Comparable across all modes.
tooltips.sessionsPerDayDesc: Number of session completed each day. бһ”бһ„бҹ’бһ бһ¶бһүs your training frequency.
tooltips.errorRateTrendDesc: Global session error-rate trend (Dual N-бһҸбҹ’бһҡбһЎбһ”бҹӢбһҖбҹ’бһҡбҹ„бһҷ Classic). Each point shows the daily average/min/max (toggle below). Lower is better.
tooltips.byModalityDualnbackClassicDesc: Error rate by modality (classic Dual N-бһҸбҹ’бһҡбһЎбһ”бҹӢбһҖбҹ’бһҡбҹ„бһҷ 2008). Your worst modality determines your progression.
tooltips.modeScoreDesc: бһ–бһ·бһ“бҹ’бһ‘бһ» specific to this game mode. Calculated using the native scoring method.
tooltips.dualnbackClassicScoreDesc: Global session error rate (Dual N-бһҸбҹ’бһҡбһЎбһ”бҹӢбһҖбҹ’бһҡбҹ„бһҷ Classic). Lower is better.
tooltips.medianRTDesc: Median response time: 50% of responses are faster, 50% slower. бһҸбһ·бһ… affected by outliers than average.
tooltips.focusDesc: бһ–бҹҒбһӣбһңбҹҒбһӣбһ¶s you switched away from the app during a session. May affect performance.
tooltips.hesitationDesc: бһҹбһҡбһ»бһ” time spent hovering over wrong slots before dropping. бһҸбһ·бһ… hesitation indicates higher confidence.

sublines.falseAlarmsV2: бһ…бһҳбҹ’бһӣбһҫбһҷs on non-targets: {{fa}}. May indicate an overly permissive match criterion. To improve: require a clear cue.
sublines.falseAlarmsDetailedV2: бһ‘бҹҒn-targets flagged: {{fa}}/{{nonTargets}}. Match criterion is too permissive.
sublines.modalityScoreV3: {{modality}}: {{hits}}/{{total}}. бһ”бһҫбһҖce this channel is dialed in, the rest follows.
sublines.consolidateV2: бһ”бһ“бҹ’бһҗбҹӮбһҳ practice needed at N-{{level}}: aim for consistency.
sublines.variableRTV3: бһ‘бҹҒtable temporal variability: some situations make you hesitate. To improve: reduce corrections.
sublines.analystModalityGapSoft: {{worst}}: {{hits}}/{{total}} (moderate gap). Tip: consolidate {{worst}} in the next session.
sublines.analystLevelUp: бһҖбһ¶бһҡбһҖбҹӮбһӣбһҳбҹ’бһўбһңбһӮбҹ’бһӮ бһҖбһҳбҹ’бһҡбһ·бһҸбһҠбҹӮбһӣбһҹбҹ’бһ‘бһ¶бһҸбҹӢбһҮбҹҶбһ“бһ¶бһүбҹ– бһҹбһ¶бһҖбһӣбҹ’бһ”бһ„ N-{{level}} бҹ” бһӮбһ“бҹ’бһӣбһ№бҹҮбҹ– бһ‘бҹ…бһҮбҹҶбһ бһ¶бһ“бһ”бһ“бҹ’бһ‘бһ¶бһ”бҹӢбҹ”
sublines.analystSymmetricalV1: бһҹбһҳбҹ’бһўбһ¶бһҸ balance across modalities: very even profile.
sublines.analystFaStrongV2: бһ‘бҹҒn-target responses at {{pct}}%: wait for a clear signal before confirming.
sublines.simpleSuggestStabilityV2: бһ”бһ“бҹ’бһ‘бһ¶бһ”бҹӢ time, keep your rhythm more consistent.

dualTrack.episodeSummary: бһ—бһ¶бһӮ {{index}}бҹ– {{start}}-__{{end}} ms В· {{duration}} ms В· бһ“бһ¶бһ‘бһё {{distance}} px
